commit.message:
Fix "node not found" crash when loading saved investigations

The root cause: externalData (saved graph data) was passed directly to
D3 without filtering invalid links. Added link validation for the
externalData path, handles both string and object source/target refs.
Also added GraphErrorBoundary to prevent graph errors from crashing
the entire app — shows a fallback UI instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use original html content from API instead of getLatestNotification

The html transformation now preserves the actual data from the API
response, handling both string and object formats for dangerouslySetInnerHTML.
Also reverts displayDrawer back to true.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve shadcn CSS import and restore indigo primary colour

- Replace unresolvable `@import "shadcn/tailwind.css"` with inlined
  content from shadcn/dist/tailwind.css (package exports don't expose
  the CSS file, causing Tailwind to fall back to the default dark-slate
  --primary and losing the indigo-600 override)
- Adds the required data-* custom variants (data-checked, data-open,
  data-closed, etc.) so Checkbox, Switch, Collapsible, and Select render
  their checked/open states correctly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Revert expansion loop to steps (not 2*steps)

The 2*steps loop combined with the floor fix makes the super-tile
period 3^(2·steps) × tileSize >> canvrad, reintroducing gaps.
With floor ensuring T_s ≤ canvrad, the loop only needs `steps`
iterations for seamless coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: Beneficiary Assignment & Validation (Feature #355) (#63)

* feat: dual-mode auth for integration tests (AB#506) (#51)

* feat: add dual-mode auth for integration tests (ROPC + unsigned JWT)

Add RopcTokenProvider and TestAuthHelper to support both unsigned JWTs
(local dev) and real Entra ROPC tokens (CI/remote). Test user emails
are config-driven via Entra:TestUsers section so each environment can
supply its own accounts.

Updates all step definitions to use TestAuthHelper and removes @devOnly
from read-only auth scenarios.

Resolves AB#506, includes AB#505

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: address Copilot review round 2 - thread safety, cache buffer, docs

- Use Lazy<IPublicClientApplication> for thread-safe MSAL app init
- Increase token cache expiry buffer from 5 to 10 minutes
- Add tenant ID format documentation (subdomain, not GUID)
- Update error messages to show both config key and env var formats
- Add XML doc clarifying email param behavior in remote mode
- Add password security documentation comment
- Add GetAdvisorTokenAsync for role API symmetry
- Add explanatory comment for authToken cleanup in AssetSteps

* refactor: address Copilot review round 3 - lazy validation, null config, docs

* docs: address Copilot review round 4 - role casing, userId scope, config format docs

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci: add ROPC env vars to Functions workflow (AB#508) (#52)

* ci: add ROPC env vars to Functions integration test jobs

Pass Entra tenant, client ID, API scope, test user emails, and test
user passwords to both dev and prod integration test jobs so
RopcTokenProvider can acquire real tokens in CI.

Resolves AB#508

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: repair Entra registration script and update appsettings for prod auth (AB#508)

- Fix 5 Graph API filter URLs: remove stray backslash before $filter
- Fix 3 inline JSON body calls: use temp files to avoid PowerShell escaping issues
- Update API appsettings.json to use prod Entra tenant (rajfinancialprod)
- Add dev Instance/Domain overrides to API appsettings.Development.json
- Update Client appsettings.json to use prod authority and SPA ClientId

* feat: link SPA app to user flow after registration

Add Step 2.5 to register-entra-apps.ps1 that automatically links the SPA
application to the SignUp_SignIn user flow via Graph API beta endpoint.

Without this linkage, users get AADSTS7500529 when attempting sign-in
because redirect URIs alone are not sufficient - the app must be explicitly
added to the flow's includeApplications list.

The step is idempotent: it checks if the app is already linked before
attempting to add it, and warns if the user flow doesn't exist yet.

Also adds UserFlowName config property to both dev and prod environments.

AB#508

* fix: use temp file pattern for az rest body params (AB#508)

Inline backtick-escaped JSON bodies can fail silently with az rest.
Convert all 3 inline --body calls to temp file pattern:
- PATCH identifierUris for API app
- POST servicePrincipals for API app
- POST servicePrincipals for SPA app

* fix: add SPA app idempotency check to prevent duplicates

Step 2 (SPA registration) now queries by displayName before creating,
matching the existing API app pattern. If found, PATCHes config instead
of POSTing a new app. Prevents duplicate app registrations on rerun.

AB#508

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use environment-aware password prefix in SWA workflow (#53)

Replace hardcoded DEVELOPMENT_TEST_* prefix with dynamic prefix based
on target environment. Production deployments now correctly read
PRODUCTION_TEST_* app settings instead of DEVELOPMENT_TEST_*.

Resolves AB#510

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: add *.code-workspace to .gitignore

* docs: add 'Script Everything' principle and scripting standards to AGENT.md

* feat: add automated admin consent grants and cleanup stale redirect URI

- Add Step 2.6: idempotent admin consent grants (SPA->Graph, SPA->API, API->Graph)
- Remove stale rajfinancial.com redirect URI from prod config
- Add ROPC clarification comment on SPA app body
- Remove manual admin-consent from Next Steps (now automated)

* docs: fix domain rajfinancial.com → app.rajfinancial.net

* fix: remove stale rajfinancial.com from CORS origins in Bicep and ARM

* feat: add test user provisioning script and Entra config outputs

- create-test-users.ps1: automated test user creation, role assignment, MFA exclusion
- entra-config-dev.json: dev tenant app registration output
- entra-config-prod.json: prod tenant app registration output

* feat: SWA workflow uses GitHub secrets, add ROPC app script AB#509

- Remove SWA app settings fetch logic from E2E tests (86 lines)
- E2E tests now use GitHub secrets directly (TEST_*_PASSWORD)
- Add create-ropc-app.ps1 for ROPC app provisioning
- Closes #509 (obsolete - no longer need SWA app settings)

* fix: use Azure CLI to close named SWA preview environments

The Azure/static-web-apps-deploy action's 'close' action is designed
for PR-based environments, not named environments created with
deployment_environment. Use az staticwebapp environment delete instead.

* chore: remove auto-build on feature/hotfix branches

- Remove feature/** and hotfix/** from push triggers
- Keep preview environment logic (Entra redirect URIs, close job)
- Preview deployments done manually via CLI to save build minutes
- Preview cleanup still runs when PRs are merged

* fix: use cryptographically secure RNG for password generation

Replace Get-Random with System.Security.Cryptography.RandomNumberGenerator
for generating test user passwords. This ensures passwords are unpredictable
even if the host is partially observed.

* fix: re-login to Azure subscription before SWA environment delete

The Entra login (allow-no-subscriptions) overwrites the Azure subscription
context, causing az staticwebapp environment delete to fail. Add a second
Azure login with subscription before the delete step.

* feat: add script to configure GitHub Actions SP role assignments

Adds configure-github-sp.ps1 to set up required Azure role assignments:
- Contributor on resource group (for deployments)
- Website Contributor at subscription level (for SWA environment delete)

The subscription-level role is needed because az staticwebapp environment
delete requires Microsoft.Web/locations/operationResults/read permission
which is scoped at subscription/location level, not resource group.

* Use Consumption plan for all environments - Switched prod from EP1 (~$150-220/mo) to Y1 Consumption (~$0-13/mo) - Both dev and prod now use pay-per-execution model - Can upgrade to EP1 later if VNet or always-warm needed

- Add Cucumber.js v11 + Playwright E2E test framework (TypeScript)

commit.message:
Please, I am a very delicate instrument. (#18)

* feat(pwa): add round actions for discordless club workflows

- add roundActions service for rsvp, leave, score, update, and delete event publishing\n- wire round detail ui actions, optimistic messaging, and test coverage\n- subscribe to round.participant.removed updates in subscriptions store\n- add account page udisc identity update request flow and tests\n- regenerate event contract artifacts used by cypress fixtures

* chore(contracts): sync pwa contract catalog with shared metadata

- resync generated contract JSON and TS artifacts from updated shared catalog\n- include producers[] typing in ws-contract-testkit EventContract model\n- keeps pwa fixtures and contract validation aligned with shared producer/consumer updates

* feat(pwa): support club-first round actions for discordless mode

- prefer activeClubUuid over guildId for round and UDisc write requests\n- keep guildId fallback when no active club is available\n- update error messaging to reflect club-or-guild identity requirements\n- extend store and account tests for club-first + fallback behavior

* chore(contracts): align pwa round payload handling with shared events

- update round fixture scenarios to the latest event payload structure

- remove fixture exceptions now that contract fixtures validate cleanly

- harden subscription parsing and contract testkit schema tolerance for go-generated schemas

* feat(pwa-events): migrate scoped subscriptions/publishes to v2 subjects

Update PWA stores, contract fixtures, Cypress helpers, and generated contract snapshots for selected v2 topic/payload combos while preserving remaining v1 topics.

* Send request source with round creation

* Fix review regressions in round and account flows

* Clean up round manager and contract updates

* test(pwa): switch contract catalog path and cover unscoped admin publish

Point ws-contract-testkit to events.contracts.json, update docs, and add unit coverage for exact admin publish subjects plus current round creation payload fields.

* feat(pwa): server-side auth to eliminate FCP flash and redundant ticket fetch

Validate refresh_token cookie in hooks.server.ts on every hard page load,
populate event.locals.{user,ticket}, and expose them via +layout.server.ts.
The layout hydrates the auth store from SSR data before swapping in the real
store, so the correct UI branch (signed-in vs sign-in page) is known at TTFB
rather than waiting for client-side JS. init.svelte skips the redundant
POST /api/auth/ticket when a server ticket is already present.

Also refactors auth.svelte.ts to resolve all complexity lint warnings:
extracts parseHashToken/buildCleanUrl, handleTicketError/userFromClaims,
and fetchTicketForClub/reloadAfterClubSwitch as private helpers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test(pwa): fix admin cypress tag event fixture

* feat(pwa): include remaining auth-related changes

* chore(pwa): update generated event contract catalogs

* perf(pwa): eliminate CLS/TBT regressions and fix layout auth flash

- Fix CLS 0.258→0.006: remove double-lazy-loading in Dashboard (static
  imports replace onMount dynamic imports + card-skeleton fallbacks)
- Fix CLS: default roundService.isLoading to true so RoundList renders
  3-card skeleton (stable height) instead of empty state (200px) before
  data arrives
- Fix TBT non-composited animation: ThemeToggle transition-colors→
  transition-[background-color] to avoid non-GPU border-top-color repaint
- Fix layout auth flash: static Navbar import, sync hydrateFromServer()
  before first render, isAuthenticatedView derived from auth.isAuthenticated
  (not page.data.user) so sign-out works correctly
- Fix FCP flash: SSR injects mock auth via +layout.server.ts MOCK_USER
  when PUBLIC_ALLOW_MOCK_PROD=true and ?mock=true, eliminating CLS ~0.26
  unauthenticated→authenticated layout shift
- Lazy-load NATS/OTel/subscriptions/dataLoader via ensureLiveModules() in
  init.svelte.ts (only on live auth path, not mock)
- font-display: optional for all Inter/Space Grotesk faces (no swap flash)
- Add tests: layout.auth.test.ts (sync hydration + sign-out), account
  udisc-form stale update prevention; update Dashboard/roundActions/
  subscriptions tests
- Lighthouse result: Performance 96, CLS 0.006, TBT 70ms, FCP/LCP 2.2s

commit.message:
Use direct DOM refs (Map) for a11y_click/fill instead of data attributes

SPA frameworks (React, Angular, ExtJS) strip data-yamil-ref attributes on
re-render, causing a11y_click to fail on sites like the Verizon router.
Now stores direct DOM element references in a window Map (like Chrome's
CDP node IDs), with metadata-based fallback for detached elements.
Also normalizes ref input to handle both "e14" and "@e14" formats.

- Daily PostgreSQL backup with 7-day retention

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove arbitrary array caps that silently corrupt portfolio data

Transactions (500), closedTrades (300), and performanceHistory (3000)
caps were arbitrary storage precautions. The transactions cap is actively
dangerous — getCurrentPositionBuys() needs full history to correctly
identify position boundaries for re-entered stocks, producing wrong
cost basis and P&L when old transactions are dropped.

- USBHost.task(10) — adds 10ms timeout to reduce pio_usb bus pressure
- Aim: reduce pio_usb instability under sustained FT232R transfers

fix(sentinel): re-apply Kea socket ACLs on every Kea restart

the recreated socket lost its ACLs and Sentinel could no longer query
DHCP leases. Use partOf to tie the ACL service to Kea's lifecycle.

commit.message:
ci: add Nix-based E2E test job (#15)

* ci: add Nix-based E2E test job

Add nix/test.nix derivation that builds kv_module with all backends
(RocksDB + SQLite) and runs ctest headlessly. Expose as .#test in
flake.nix and wire into GitHub Actions CI workflow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(nix): bypass broken RocksDB cmake config in test build

Nix's rocksdb package ships a cmake config with missing IMPORTED
targets, causing the E2E test build to fail.  Disable find_package(RocksDB)
so cmake falls back to pkg-config, which works correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(nix): set writable TMPDIR and HOME for test sandbox

The backend conformance tests use std::filesystem::temp_directory_path()
which reads TMPDIR. In the Nix build sandbox, the default temp paths may
not be writable, causing RocksDB, SQLite, and FileBackend tests to fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use build-dir TMPDIR in Nix sandbox for conformance tests

* fix: use KV_TEST_TMPDIR env var for sandbox-safe temp dirs in tests

* fix: disable Nix chroot for test derivation (RocksDB/SQLite need real filesystem)

* fix: use PID+counter for unique temp dirs, avoiding ctest process collisions

---------

Co-authored-by: Jimmy Claw <jimmy@claw.dev>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix tiling gaps: use floor instead of ceil for expansion steps

ceil caused the super-tile period (3^s × tileSize) to exceed the
buffer canvas size (canvrad), leaving pixel gaps between adjacent
super-tile placements at all zoom levels. floor ensures the period
is ≤ canvrad so adjacent buffers' content regions abut seamlessly.

commit.message:
Backend assembly migration (Phases 2-5): server-side compression, DB history loading, legacy endpoint unification, dead frontend code cleanup

Phase 2 — Backend compression service: per-session LLM compression with caching,
replaces Phase 1's extract_block bridge. History trimming: only recent window
formatted when compression active.

Phase 3 — Backend loads chat history from SQLite: normal generation omits
chat_history from payload (~200KB → ~5KB). DB query filters thinking role
and non-complete status, resolves message variations.

Phase 4 — Legacy endpoint assembly: greeting, impersonate, room content, and
thin frame endpoints now use PromptAssemblyService methods. Added _pre_assembled
flag to prevent stream_generate's legacy path from overwriting assembly results
(fixes compounding bug where generation instructions were lost from memory).
HTML stripping and user_persona injection added to assemble_impersonate.

Phase 5 — Dead frontend code cleanup: deleted compressionService.ts, removed
isCompressing/compressedContextCache/invalidateCompressionCache from contexts,
removed dead compression callbacks from generation pipeline.

Review fixes applied:
- backendHistory gated on config.type === 'generate' only (regen/continue/greeting
  send chat_history in payload to avoid including stale messages from DB)
- _pre_assembled flag prevents legacy path from overwriting assembly service memory
  and KoboldCPP stop sequences for all 4 legacy endpoints
- strip_html_tags added to assemble_impersonate instruct path
- user_persona injection added to assemble_impersonate (was handled by legacy path)

Backend: 170 passed, Frontend: 475 passed, TypeScript: clean compilation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- 비타이틀 텍스트 fontWeight 700/800→600 (Inter 600으로 통일)
- displayFont 제거하여 Inter sans-serif로 통일

feat: add offline caching for File Provider extension (#66) (#73)

* feat: add offline caching for File Provider extension (#66)

Add CacheManager with JSON manifest tracking, LRU eviction (default
500MB limit), and per-vault cache partitioning. File Provider now checks
cache before decrypting from vault, and invalidates entries on modify/
delete. Cache size display and clear button added to VaultInfoSheet
(macOS) and VaultInfoView (iOS).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR #73 review — security, performance, and correctness

Security fixes:
- Set FileProtection.complete on iOS for cached decrypted files
- Default clearOnLock to true (was false due to UserDefaults.bool semantics)
- Add security tradeoff documentation comment
- Replace weak polynomial hash with SHA-256 for cache filenames

Correctness fixes:
- Scope invalidate() to current vault instead of clearing all vaults
- Add manifest reconciliation to detect OS-purged cached files

Performance fixes:
- Replace NSLock with concurrent DispatchQueue using barrier writes,
  keeping file I/O outside the critical section
- Cache manifests in memory, flush to disk only on significant changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use UserDefaults.register(defaults:) for clearOnLock and prevent clearCache fall-through

Use the standard register(defaults:) mechanism for the clearOnLock default
instead of manual nil-checking, and guard against clearing all vaults when
no vault is open in VaultManager.clearCache().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: predictive features design + unified implementation plan (#347)

* docs: predictive features design + unified implementation plan

Consolidate design docs from 3 spec worktrees (regime detection, multi-TF
context, external data) and create unified 10-milestone implementation plan
with 54 tasks across 3 threads.

Three threads composing the "adult brain" architecture:
- Regime Detection: 4-class classification, per-regime signal models, ensemble routing
- Multi-TF Context: daily trend context gating hourly signals via asymmetric thresholds
- External Data: FRED yields, CFTC positioning, cross-pair context providers

Critical path: M2 → M4 → M7 (regime labeling → classifier → ensemble backtest)
Wave 1 parallelism: M1, M2, M3, M6 can run simultaneously

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(docs): address Copilot review — align pseudocode with actual codebase APIs

- PositionManager: execute_trade(signal, price, timestamp) not process_decision()
- DecisionFunction output: dict with "probabilities" key, class-name keys not indices
- ThresholdModifier: accept Signal enum not direction string
- output_activation: softmax is safe (DecisionFunction auto-detects), match existing strategies
- File paths: feature_cache.py and model_bundle.py live in backtesting/, not training/
- ensemble_config.py path: consistently ktrdr/config/, not ktrdr/backtesting/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
